overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime exploration of a neon-lit Asian-inspired market district. The player walks through covered market streets with traditional red lanterns and futuristic signage, transitions through a dark corridor, and emerges into an open plaza with illuminated cherry blossom trees and towering skyscrapers.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered market street approaching a 24-hour ramen shop with red lanterns

notable_agents.action: standing near market stall in the background

entered.detail: metal overhead structure covering the market street with hanging cables
traditional Japanese paper lanterns hanging in rows above the street
large neon sign with Japanese characters indicating 24-hour operation
reflective wet pavement showing neon light reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk market street at night, illuminated by red paper lanterns and vibrant neon signs. The camera moves forward toward a 24-hour ramen shop, with wet asphalt reflecting the colorful lights overhead. Sparse NPCs stand near market stalls in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor behind market stalls

events.description: enters dark narrow corridor with concrete walls and red ambient lighting
exits corridor back into lit market area with visible overhead structure

agents.ego_description: passing through a dark service corridor and returning to the market area

entered.detail: dark concrete corridor walls with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dark, narrow service corridor with concrete walls and minimal lighting, creating a brief transition from the vibrant market. Upon exiting, the view returns to the market area with the overhead metal structure now closer and more visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market section with food stalls and advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at overhead structure and lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking through market looking at various stalls and glancing up at the overhead structure

notable_agents.action: sitting at food stall counter on green bar stools

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement showing a wrestler with text 'GET CHILL MY FAVORITE'
open-air food service counter with green bar stools
green circular bar stools lined up at the counter

segments.scene_description: The camera explores an open-air market section featuring a prominent 'GET CHILL' wrestling advertisement and food stalls with green bar stools. The overhead metal structure is visible with red lanterns hanging beneath it. An NPC sits at a counter while the camera briefly tilts upward to examine the architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor area with open kitchen and service counter

events.description: passes by food vendor working at preparation counter

agents.ego_description: walking past a food preparation counter where a vendor is working

notable_agents.action: vendor preparing food behind a metal counter with plates and cooking equipment

entered.detail: stainless steel food preparation counter with plates and cooking steam
commercial kitchen equipment visible behind the counter
wide concrete staircase leading upward between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past an active food preparation counter where a vendor works with cooking equipment and steam rising from the grill. The path continues toward a wide concrete staircase visible in the distance, while the 'GET CHILL' billboard and previous counter exit the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide concrete staircase ascending between buildings toward open plaza

events.description: emerging from covered market to open plaza with view of skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs while looking up at towering skyscrapers and illuminated cherry trees above

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with red painted edges and metal railings
towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible above
trees with pink illuminated blossoms visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase with red-edged steps, transitioning from the enclosed market. An NPC descends the stairs while the view opens up to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and illuminated cherry blossom trees waiting at the top of the stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with illuminated cherry trees and digital billboards

events.description: enters open plaza from stairway with full view of cherry blossoms and skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza past illuminated cherry blossom trees and food carts

notable_agents.action: standing at food cart under red umbrella

entered.detail: large square paving stones covering the open plaza ground
food service cart with large red umbrella providing shelter
tall vertical digital advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a spacious urban plaza with illuminated cherry blossom trees glowing pink against the night sky. The camera moves past a food cart with a red umbrella while towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards rise in the background. The environment shifts from enclosed market to open public space with scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit market street into a vast, open urban plaza. It begins by moving through a covered market illuminated by red lanterns and vibrant signs, reflecting off wet asphalt as the camera passes a ramen shop. The view then shifts through a dark, narrow service corridor before emerging back into the market's open-air section, passing green bar stools and a prominent wrestling advertisement. As the camera moves past a steaming food preparation counter, the path leads toward a wide concrete staircase that the viewer ascends, leaving the enclosed stalls behind. Finally, the scene opens into a spacious plaza where glowing pink cherry blossom trees and towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards replace the dense market architecture.
